courses.title: Stress Management Essentials
courses.short_description: A practical introduction to understanding and managing everyday stress.
courses.full_description: Learn the science of stress, how it shows up in your body and mind, and build a toolkit of simple practices to reset your nervous system during busy days.

courses.title: Rapid Stress Relievers You Can Use Anywhere
courses.short_description: Bite-sized techniques for calming your body and mind on the go.
courses.full_description: This course walks you through quick, evidence-based practices like breathing exercises, micro-breaks, and grounding that you can use discreetly at work or in public.

courses.title: Stress Less in Under 2 Hours
courses.short_description: A focused mini-course to help you understand and tame your stress response.
courses.full_description: In under two hours, you’ll learn what keeps your stress loop going and how to break it using small, sustainable changes.

courses.title: Deep Dive into Stress Resilience

courses.full_description: Explore mindset shifts, nervous system regulation, boundary-setting, and lifestyle design for sustainable resilience.

courses.full_description: Understand burnout phases, rebuild your capacity step by step, and learn to protect your energy going forward.

courses.title: Foundations of Emotional Resilience

courses.title: Mindful Meditation Starter Pack
courses.full_description: Step-by-step meditations with clear instruction so you can practice mindfulness without feeling overwhelmed.

courses.title: Anxiety Toolkit: Skills for Calmer Days
courses.short_description: Practical tools to respond to anxious thoughts and sensations.
courses.full_description: Learn grounding, reframing, and lifestyle strategies to reduce the impact of anxiety on your day-to-day life.

courses.full_description: Move through a structured process of clarifying your values, strengths, and realistic next steps for your career.

courses.title: Emotional Awareness Skills

courses.full_description: Learn scripts, boundaries, and nervous system tools for coping with work-related anxiety.

assessment_questions.question_text: Overall, how would you rate your mood today?
How much physical energy do you feel you have right now?
How stressed or tense have you felt over the past day?
How connected do you feel to other people today?
How hopeful do you feel about the near future?
In one sentence, describe anything that most influenced your mood today.
How often have you felt emotionally exhausted by your responsibilities in the past two weeks?
How frequently do you feel detached or cynical about your work or daily tasks?
To what extent do you feel that you are effective and making a positive difference in what you do?
How often do you struggle to relax or switch off, even when you have time?
Which area of your life currently feels most stressful?
In the last two weeks, how often have you felt nervous, anxious, or on edge?
How often have you found it difficult to control or stop worrying?
To what extent are your anxiety symptoms interfering with your daily life (work, relationships, or self-care)?
When you face a setback, how confident are you that you can eventually handle it?
How often do you reach out to others for support when you are struggling?
How quickly do you usually recover emotionally after a difficult experience?
Describe one habit or practice that already helps you stay grounded during tough times.

challenge_template_days.title: Day 1: Name Your Feelings
challenge_template_days.description: Begin by checking in with how you feel emotionally right now and giving each feeling a simple name.

challenge_template_days.title: Day 2: Grounding with the 5 Senses
challenge_template_days.description: Practice a short 5-senses grounding exercise to reconnect with the present moment.

challenge_template_days.title: Day 3: Values Check-In
challenge_template_days.description: Reflect on which personal value you want to lean on most this month.

challenge_template_days.title: Day 4: Support Scan
challenge_template_days.description: List people, communities, or resources that help you feel supported when life is hard.

challenge_template_days.title: Day 5: Nervous System Reset
challenge_template_days.description: Try a short breathing or body-based practice to gently calm your nervous system.

challenge_template_days.title: Day 6: Self-Talk Audit
challenge_template_days.description: Notice one common self-critical thought and rewrite it in a kinder, more realistic way.

challenge_template_days.title: Day 7: Weekly Reflection
challenge_template_days.description: Look back on the week and jot down three small examples of resilience you showed.

challenge_template_days.title: Day 8: Boundaries Check
challenge_template_days.description: Identify one small boundary you can set or strengthen to protect your energy.

challenge_template_days.title: Day 9: Tiny Joys
challenge_template_days.description: Pause to notice and write down three tiny, pleasant moments from today.

challenge_template_days.title: Day 10: Coping Skills Menu
challenge_template_days.description: Create a short list of healthy coping strategies you can choose from when you feel overwhelmed.

challenge_template_days.title: Day 11: Body Check-In
challenge_template_days.description: Do a brief body scan and note where you tend to hold tension when stressed.

challenge_template_days.title: Day 12: Reframing a Challenge
challenge_template_days.description: Choose one current challenge and practice viewing it from a more empowering angle.

challenge_template_days.title: Day 13: Connection Moment
challenge_template_days.description: Reach out to someone you trust with a short message, call, or check-in.

challenge_template_days.title: Day 14: Rest & Restore
challenge_template_days.description: Schedule a small rest-focused activity to help your body recharge.

challenge_template_days.title: Day 15: Midpoint Reflection
challenge_template_days.description: Reflect on what has been most helpful so far and what you want to adjust for the next two weeks.

challenge_template_days.title: Day 16: Gratitude for Your Effort
challenge_template_days.description: Acknowledge the effort you have invested in this challenge and note one thing you appreciate about yourself.

challenge_template_days.title: Day 1: Stress Baseline
challenge_template_days.description: Rate your current stress level and note the top three sources of stress in your life.

challenge_template_days.title: Day 7: One-Week Checkpoint
challenge_template_days.description: Review whats helped you feel even slightly calmer this week and what still feels hard.

coaches.bio: Anna is a certified career and transitions coach who helps professionals move from burnout and confusion into purposeful, values-aligned work. She combines practical planning with emotional support so you feel confident taking your next step.
Jamal specializes in supporting mid-career professionals who feel stuck or second-guess their abilities. His coaching blends strengths-based assessments with clear action plans and mindset work.
Maria supports high-achieving professionals who are considering a career change after burnout. She focuses on nervous system regulation, sustainable pacing, and practical career experiments.
Lee offers gentle, structured support for people navigating mild to moderate depression and low mood. Sessions emphasize self-compassion, routine building, and realistic next steps.
Sonia integrates mindfulness-based tools with practical planning to help clients move through depression, rebuild motivation, and reconnect with what matters most.
Michael works with clients experiencing depression related to loss, relationship changes, or major life transitions, offering steady, non-judgmental support.
Elena helps leaders and caregivers recognize early signs of burnout and design sustainable schedules, boundaries, and recovery rituals.
Daniel supports clients who struggle with anxiety and self-doubt in social and professional settings, using exposure planning and confidence-building exercises.
Ivy focuses on helping clients build emotional awareness and track their mood so they can make kinder, more aligned choices each day.
Rafael partners with emerging leaders and career changers to clarify direction, manage stress, and communicate with confidence at work.
Hannah helps clients reset their relationship with rest and sleep, designing realistic evening routines and calming practices.
Omar supports professionals recovering from chronic stress and burnout, with a focus on pacing, boundaries, and identity beyond work.
Nora works with clients who want to feel calmer and more confident in their close relationships and everyday communication.
Paolo integrates mindfulness, breathwork, and gentle accountability to support clients living with low mood and chronic stress.
